description: Hero WODs honor fallen U.S. military, law enforcement, and first responders. Each workout is named after a specific individual.

benchmarks.name: Murph
benchmarks.honoree: Lt. Michael Murphy, U.S. Navy SEAL, KIA Afghanistan, June 28, 2005
benchmarks.scheme_notes: For time. Wear 20lb vest if possible. Partition pull-ups, push-ups, squats as needed (e.g., 20 rounds of Cindy).
benchmarks.scaling_options: No vest. Reduce reps to half Murph (1/2 mile, 50/100/150, 1/2 mile). Banded pull-ups.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Memorial Day tradition. 35-65 min typical. Sub-40 advanced. Tests aerobic durability + bodyweight volume.

benchmarks.name: DT
benchmarks.honoree: USAF SSgt Timothy P. Davis, KIA Afghanistan, February 20, 2009
benchmarks.programming_notes: Single barbell. Sub-7 elite. Tests grip + sustained barbell cycling.

benchmarks.name: JT
benchmarks.honoree: Petty Officer 1st Class Jeff Taylor, U.S. Navy SEAL, KIA Afghanistan, June 28, 2005
benchmarks.scaling_options: Pike push-ups, banded ring dips, knee push-ups.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Pure pressing test. Sub-5 elite. Watch for tricep burnout.

benchmarks.name: Daniel
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. 1st Class Daniel Crabtree, KIA Iraq, June 8, 2006
benchmarks.programming_notes: Sub-10 elite. Tests pacing across mixed modal.

benchmarks.name: Randy
benchmarks.honoree: LAPD SWAT Officer Randy Simmons, KIA February 7, 2008
benchmarks.programming_notes: Sub-5 elite. Pure barbell sprint. Tests light snatch cycling.

benchmarks.name: Michael
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Lt. Michael McGreevy Jr., KIA Afghanistan, June 28, 2005
benchmarks.scaling_options: GHD or hip extension scaling. Anchored sit-ups.
benchmarks.programming_notes: 20-30 min typical. Tests aerobic + posterior chain.

benchmarks.name: Josh
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Joshua Hager, KIA Iraq, February 22, 2007

benchmarks.name: Jason
benchmarks.honoree: Petty Officer 1st Class Jason Lewis, KIA Iraq, July 6, 2007
benchmarks.scaling_options: Bar muscle-ups. Jumping muscle-ups. Chin-up + dip combo.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Skill-gated. Tests muscle-up volume + leg endurance.

benchmarks.name: Badger
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Chief Petty Officer Mark Carter, KIA Iraq, December 11, 2007
benchmarks.programming_notes: Tests pacing across longer mixed modal.

benchmarks.name: Joshie
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Joshua Whitaker, KIA Afghanistan, May 15, 2007
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 3 rounds for time. DB snatch right arm, then L pull-ups, then DB snatch left arm, then L pull-ups (per round). 21 reps each arm per round.
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce DB load. Knees-up pull-ups instead of L.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Skill-gated by L pull-up. Tests grip + midline.

benchmarks.name: Arnie
benchmarks.honoree: LAFD Firefighter Arnaldo "Arnie" Quinones, EOW December 16, 2009
benchmarks.scheme_notes: For time. With single KB held overhead for OHS portion.

benchmarks.name: Bradley
benchmarks.honoree: Senior Chief Petty Officer David Blake McLendon, KIA Afghanistan, September 21, 2010
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 10 rounds for time. Rest 30 seconds between rounds.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Sprint repeat format. Tests anaerobic recovery.

benchmarks.name: Tommy V
benchmarks.honoree: Senior Chief Petty Officer Thomas J. Valentine, USN, KIA training accident, May 13, 2008
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce thruster load. Rope sit-ups for rope climbs.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Skill-gated by rope climb. Tests grip + lower body.

benchmarks.name: Ryan
benchmarks.honoree: Maplewood, MO Police Officer Ryan Hummert, EOW July 21, 2008
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 5 rounds for time. Burpees must be chest-to-deck.
benchmarks.scaling_options: Bar muscle-ups, jumping muscle-ups, or chin-up + dip.

benchmarks.name: Roy
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Sgt. Michael C. Roy, KIA Afghanistan, July 8, 2009
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce DL load. Step-ups. Banded pull-ups.

benchmarks.name: Adam Brown
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Chief Special Warfare Operator Adam Lee Brown, KIA Afghanistan, March 17, 2010
benchmarks.programming_notes: Heavy chipper. 25-40 min typical. Tests strength endurance.

benchmarks.name: Manion
benchmarks.honoree: USMC 1st Lt. Travis Manion, KIA Iraq, April 29, 2007

benchmarks.name: Rankel
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Sgt. John Rankel, KIA Afghanistan, June 7, 2010
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce DL/KB loads. Step-up burpee or burpee then pull-up.

benchmarks.name: Bull
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Sgt. Cesar Ruiz, KIA Afghanistan, July 13, 2011

benchmarks.name: Coe
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Keith Coe, KIA Afghanistan, April 27, 2010

benchmarks.name: Hammer
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Jason "Hammer" Brown, KIA Afghanistan, September 23, 2010
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 5 rounds for time. Rest 90 seconds between rounds.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Mandatory rest between rounds. Tests max output per round.

benchmarks.name: Holleyman
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Aaron Holleyman, KIA Iraq, August 30, 2004
benchmarks.programming_notes: Long mixed modal. Tests sustained capacity.

benchmarks.name: Hortman
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. John D. Hortman, KIA Iraq, August 8, 2011
benchmarks.programming_notes: Long aerobic test. Pace control critical.

benchmarks.name: Klepto
benchmarks.honoree: USAF SSgt David "Klepto" Wieger, KIA Afghanistan, November 1, 2010

benchmarks.name: Loredo
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Edwardo Loredo, KIA Afghanistan, June 24, 2010

benchmarks.name: Luce
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Capt. Ronald G. Luce, KIA Afghanistan, August 2, 2009

benchmarks.name: McCluskey
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Jason A. McCluskey, KIA Afghanistan, October 6, 2010

benchmarks.name: McGhee
benchmarks.honoree: Army Cpl. Ryan C. McGhee, KIA Iraq, May 1, 2009
benchmarks.programming_notes: Long heavy AMRAP. Tests grip endurance.

benchmarks.name: Moore
benchmarks.honoree: Sgt. 1st Class Jared C. Monti, U.S. Army, KIA Afghanistan (Note: 'Moore' was actually for Officer David S. Moore, Indianapolis PD)

benchmarks.name: Nate
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Chief Special Warfare Operator Nate Hardy, KIA Iraq, February 4, 2008
benchmarks.scaling_options: Bar/jumping MU. Pike push-ups. Reduce KB load.

benchmarks.name: Paul
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Paul Pena, KIA Afghanistan, January 19, 2010
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 5 rounds for time. Walking overhead lunge with 45lb plate.

benchmarks.name: Pheezy
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Patrick Hawkins, KIA Afghanistan, October 6, 2013

benchmarks.name: Robbie
benchmarks.honoree: USAF SSgt Robert J. Pirelli, KIA Iraq, August 15, 2007
benchmarks.scheme_notes: AMRAP 25 minutes. 1 rope climb every minute. After completing all 8 rope climbs, max rounds of: 5 burpees + 10 box jumps (24/20).

benchmarks.name: Santiago
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. Daniel W. Eggers, KIA Afghanistan, May 29, 2004 (note: also Army Staff Sgt. Mike Santiago)
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce loads. Hanging knee raise. Step-ups.

benchmarks.name: Severin
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Severin W. Summers III, KIA Afghanistan, August 2, 2009

benchmarks.name: Small
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Marc Small, KIA Afghanistan, February 12, 2009

benchmarks.name: Stephen
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. Major Lance Vincent, KIA Iraq
benchmarks.scaling_options: Sit-ups for GHD. Hanging knee raise.

benchmarks.name: T.U.P.
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. Major Thomas "Patrick" Payne

benchmarks.name: Tyler
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. Tyler Parten, KIA Afghanistan, September 10, 2009

benchmarks.name: Tumilson
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Special Warfare Operator Jon Tumilson, KIA Afghanistan, August 6, 2011
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 8 rounds for time. Burpee deadlift = burpee + DB deadlift.

benchmarks.name: War Frank
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Maj. Douglas A. Zembiec, KIA Iraq, May 11, 2007

benchmarks.name: Weaver
benchmarks.honoree: Aaron Weaver

benchmarks.name: White
benchmarks.honoree: Army 1st Lt. Ashley White, KIA Afghanistan, October 22, 2011

benchmarks.name: Whitten
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. Dan Whitten, KIA Afghanistan, February 2, 2010

benchmarks.name: Wilmot
benchmarks.honoree: Canadian Sgt. Jonathan Joseph Wilmot, KIA Afghanistan, December 27, 2008

benchmarks.name: Wittman
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. 1st Class Jeffrey M. Wittman

benchmarks.name: Wood
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. David J. Thompson

benchmarks.name: Zeus
benchmarks.honoree: Army Spc. David E. Hickman, KIA Iraq, November 14, 2011

benchmarks.name: Glen
benchmarks.honoree: Glen Doherty, KIA Benghazi Libya, September 11, 2012
benchmarks.scheme_notes: For time. 1 rope climb after every 3 C&J.

benchmarks.name: Abbate
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Sgt. Matthew T. Abbate, KIA Afghanistan, December 2, 2010

benchmarks.name: The Seven
benchmarks.honoree: 7 CIA officers KIA Khost Afghanistan, December 30, 2009
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce loads. Pike push-ups. Hanging knee raise.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Heavy mixed modal grinder. Sub-30 advanced.

benchmarks.name: Lumberjack 20
benchmarks.honoree: Operation Lumberjack victims (Fort Hood shooting victims, November 5, 2009)
benchmarks.programming_notes: Long mixed modal chipper. 35-50 min typical.

benchmarks.name: Mr. Joshua
benchmarks.honoree: Navy SO1 Joshua Thomas Harris, drowned during combat operations, August 30, 2008
benchmarks.scaling_options: Sit-ups for GHD. Reduce DL load.

benchmarks.name: Hansen
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Staff Sgt. Daniel Hansen, KIA Afghanistan, February 14, 2009
benchmarks.scaling_options: Reduce KB load. Sit-ups for GHD.

benchmarks.name: Bradshaw
benchmarks.honoree: Army 1st Lt. Brian Bradshaw, KIA Afghanistan, June 25, 2009

benchmarks.name: Kev
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. 1st Class Kevin J. Griffin, KIA Afghanistan, August 8, 2012

benchmarks.name: Marston
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Special Warfare Operator 1st Class Jonas Kelsall, KIA Afghanistan
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 1 deadlift, 10 HPC, 5 box jump overs - then repeat for 10 rounds for time.

benchmarks.name: Riley
benchmarks.honoree: Marine Cpl. Riley Stephen Howell, EOW April 30, 2019 (note: also for SFC Riley Spaulding)

benchmarks.name: Spehar
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Special Warfare Operator 1st Class Nicholas P. Spehar, KIA Afghanistan, August 6, 2011
benchmarks.scheme_notes: For time. Run is broken into 3 mile run, then thrusters/C2B, then 3 mile run.

benchmarks.name: Willy
benchmarks.honoree: Army Pvt. William Long

benchmarks.name: Zembiec
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Maj. Douglas A. Zembiec

benchmarks.name: Jenny
benchmarks.honoree: Capt. Jennifer Moreno, U.S. Army, KIA Afghanistan, October 6, 2013

benchmarks.name: Jerry
benchmarks.honoree: Sgt. Maj. Jerry Dwayne Patton, KIA Afghanistan, October 15, 2008

benchmarks.name: Jack
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Jack M. Martin III, KIA Afghanistan, September 29, 2009

benchmarks.name: Holbrook
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. Jason Holbrook, KIA Afghanistan, July 29, 2010
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 10 rounds. Every 3 minutes start a round. Score = total time.

benchmarks.name: Hidalgo
benchmarks.honoree: Army Staff Sgt. Daniel Hidalgo

benchmarks.name: Horton
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Sgt. Jeremy R. McQueary

benchmarks.name: Jared
benchmarks.honoree: USAF Master Sgt. Jared Van Aalst, KIA Afghanistan, August 4, 2010

benchmarks.name: Griff
benchmarks.honoree: USAF SSgt Travis L. Griffin, KIA Iraq, April 3, 2008

benchmarks.name: JAG 28
benchmarks.honoree: USAF Senior Airman Mark Forester, KIA Afghanistan, September 29, 2010

benchmarks.name: Johnson
benchmarks.honoree: Army Sgt. 1st Class Jeff M. Johnson

benchmarks.name: Omar
benchmarks.honoree: Army Capt. Daniel W. Eggers

benchmarks.name: The Chief
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Senior Chief Special Warfare Operator Thomas J. Valentine
benchmarks.scheme_notes: 5 rounds. Each round: AMRAP 3 minutes. Rest 1 minute between rounds. Score = total rounds + reps across all 5 windows.
benchmarks.programming_notes: Tests anaerobic recovery. Each 3-min window is a sprint.

benchmarks.name: Hildy
benchmarks.honoree: Army Master Sgt. James Bryan Hilderbrandt, EOW July 2, 2014

benchmarks.name: Morrison
benchmarks.honoree: Army Spc. Scott Morrison, KIA Afghanistan, September 26, 2010

benchmarks.name: Nutts
benchmarks.honoree: Canadian Lt. Andrew Richard Nuttall, KIA Afghanistan, December 23, 2009

benchmarks.name: Tom
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Capt. Thomas C. Lowery

benchmarks.name: Zimmerman
benchmarks.honoree: USMC 1st Lt. James R. Zimmerman, KIA Afghanistan, November 2, 2010
benchmarks.scaling_options: Chest-to-bar pull-ups for BMU. Pike push-ups.

benchmarks.name: TK
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Special Warfare Operator Senior Chief Thomas A. Ratzlaff

benchmarks.name: Rahoi
benchmarks.honoree: USMC Capt. Brian S. Hazelgrove

benchmarks.name: Thompson
benchmarks.honoree: Navy Special Warfare Operator 2nd Class Jason D. Workman
